dialogueChunks.intro: Things have gotten worse. While you were investigating {quest_focus}, an incident near {location_hint} has pushed both sides closer to violence.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that armed groups from {location} were spotted near our borders. Whether it's posturing or preparation, {quest_threat} is escalating. The {enemy_type} are exploiting the distraction to raid both settlements.
dialogueChunks.outro: Deal with the {enemy_type} raids first. If both settlements see you fighting their common enemy, it might cool tempers long enough to find a real solution for {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: I'll remind them who the real enemy is.
Fighting the raiders buys us time.

dialogueChunks.intro: Both sides claim innocence, and both sides blame the other. The truth about {quest_focus} is out there, but it won't come from accusations alone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} insists they had nothing to do with it, and they seem genuine. {quest_ally} suggests looking for evidence near {location_hint}: if a third party is responsible for {quest_threat}, there will be traces the {enemy_type} left behind.
dialogueChunks.outro: Search the area around {location} for anything that proves who's really at fault. {quest_stakes} hang on what you find.

playerResponses.text: The truth has to be out there.

dialogueChunks.intro: The dispute over {quest_focus} has split opinions within our own settlement. Some side with {target_npc}, saying we were in the wrong all along.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is trying to hold things together, but the internal division is giving {quest_threat} room to grow. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type} raided our stores near {location_hint} while everyone was arguing.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need something to unite both factions. Recover what the {enemy_type} stole and bring it back. A common cause might be the only thing that saves {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: A shared problem might bring them together.
I'll get the supplies back first.
